description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad, horizontal white stripes encircling its midsection, which are likely intended for high visibility. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, typical of flexible plastic or rubber used for such objects. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. The base is flat, square, and slightly thicker than the cone itself, providing a stable foundation to prevent tipping. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the surface, and the cone appears to be in new or unused condition.
description: A tall orange traffic cone with two wide white stripes and a square, stable base. The surface is smooth and unmarked, appearing new and clean.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed orange tip, two white stripes, and the full square base.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same visible stripes and base proportions.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, still showing the pointed tip, stripes, and square base with no visible differences.
description_view_3: Back view, visually similar to the other sides, with the same orange and white pattern and square base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white stripes encircle the cone, evenly spaced along the upper and middle sections. The stripes are likely reflective but appear as solid white in the images.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat, square, and slightly thicker than the cone, made of the same orange material, providing stability and resistance to tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, clean, and free of visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
